channel.title: Steam New Games
channel.description: RSS feed for Steam New Games.

item.title: Call of Duty®: Black Ops 7 - BlackCell (Season 04)
item.description:
Title: Call of Duty®: Black Ops 7 - BlackCell (Season 04)
Genre: Action
Developer: Treyarch , Raven Software , Beenox , High Moon Studios , Sledgehammer Games , Infinity Ward , Activision Shanghai , Demonware
Publisher: Activision
Franchise: Call of Duty , Modern Warfare , Modern Warfare II , Modern Warfare III , Black Ops
Release Date: Jun 4, 2026




About This Content

Get Call of Duty® Points (CP)* and in-game content for Call of Duty®: Black Ops 7 and Call of Duty®: Warzone™.

Offering includes:

- Battle Pass for Season 04

- 20 Tier Skips

- BlackCell Page Unlock

Plus, instantly unlock:

- 1,100 Call of Duty® Points

- BlackCell Operator with two unlockable Operator Skins

- Mastercraft Weapon Blueprint with two unlockable Mastercraft Weapon Blueprints

- BlackCell Weapon Camo Track to Unlock

- Finishing Move

- Gun Screen

- BlackCell Clan Tag

- BlackCell HUD Theme

Players will also receive a 10% XP and WXP Loyalty Bonus for purchases of subsequent BlackCell Seasons (up to 50% for BO7 Seasons only). Plus, bonus BlackCell unlockable content, including BlackCell-only Battle Pass items and more.

Activision may update, replace, or remove this in-game content at any time.

Mature Content Description

The developers describe the content like this:

This game may contain content not appropriate for all ages, or may not be appropriate for viewing at work: Frequent Violence or Gore, General Mature Content.



System Requirements

Windows

    Minimum:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows® 10 64 Bit (latest update)
    • Processor: AMD Ryzen™ 5 1400 or Intel® Core™ i5-6600
    • Memory: 8 GB RAM
    • Graphics: AMD Radeon™ RX 470, NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 970 / 1060 or Intel® Arc™ A580
    • DirectX: Version 12
    • Network: Broadband Internet connection
    • Additional Notes: SSD with 161 GB available space at launch
    Recommended:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows® 11 64 Bit (latest update)
    • Processor: AMD Ryzen™ 5 1600X or Intel® Core™ i7-6700K
    • Memory: 12 GB RAM
    • Graphics: AMD Radeon™ RX 6600XT, NVIDIA® GeForce® RTX 3060 or Intel® Arc™ B580
    • DirectX: Version 12
    • Network: Broadband Internet connection
    • Additional Notes: SSD with 161 GB available space at launch
item.content:encoded:
Title: Call of Duty®: Black Ops 7 - BlackCell (Season 04)
Genre: Action
Developer: Treyarch , Raven Software , Beenox , High Moon Studios , Sledgehammer Games , Infinity Ward , Activision Shanghai , Demonware
Publisher: Activision
Franchise: Call of Duty , Modern Warfare , Modern Warfare II , Modern Warfare III , Black Ops
Release Date: Jun 4, 2026




About This Content

Get Call of Duty® Points (CP)* and in-game content for Call of Duty®: Black Ops 7 and Call of Duty®: Warzone™.

Offering includes:

- Battle Pass for Season 04

- 20 Tier Skips

- BlackCell Page Unlock

Plus, instantly unlock:

- 1,100 Call of Duty® Points

- BlackCell Operator with two unlockable Operator Skins

- Mastercraft Weapon Blueprint with two unlockable Mastercraft Weapon Blueprints

- BlackCell Weapon Camo Track to Unlock

- Finishing Move

- Gun Screen

- BlackCell Clan Tag

- BlackCell HUD Theme

Players will also receive a 10% XP and WXP Loyalty Bonus for purchases of subsequent BlackCell Seasons (up to 50% for BO7 Seasons only). Plus, bonus BlackCell unlockable content, including BlackCell-only Battle Pass items and more.

Activision may update, replace, or remove this in-game content at any time.

Mature Content Description

The developers describe the content like this:

This game may contain content not appropriate for all ages, or may not be appropriate for viewing at work: Frequent Violence or Gore, General Mature Content.



System Requirements

Windows

    Minimum:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows® 10 64 Bit (latest update)
    • Processor: AMD Ryzen™ 5 1400 or Intel® Core™ i5-6600
    • Memory: 8 GB RAM
    • Graphics: AMD Radeon™ RX 470, NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 970 / 1060 or Intel® Arc™ A580
    • DirectX: Version 12
    • Network: Broadband Internet connection
    • Additional Notes: SSD with 161 GB available space at launch
    Recommended:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows® 11 64 Bit (latest update)
    • Processor: AMD Ryzen™ 5 1600X or Intel® Core™ i7-6700K
    • Memory: 12 GB RAM
    • Graphics: AMD Radeon™ RX 6600XT, NVIDIA® GeForce® RTX 3060 or Intel® Arc™ B580
    • DirectX: Version 12
    • Network: Broadband Internet connection
    • Additional Notes: SSD with 161 GB available space at launch

item.title: House Flipper Remastered Collection
item.description:
Title: House Flipper Remastered Collection
Genre: Casual , Indie , Simulation
Developer: Frozen Way
Publisher: Frozen Way , Frozen District
Franchise: Frozen Way , Frozen District , House Flipper
Release Date: Jun 4, 2026




About This Game

RENOVATION NEVER LOOKED SO GOOD

House Flipper Remastered Collection is your upgraded ticket to the satisfying world of renovation chaos. Step into the boots of a one-person crew and transform those filthy, devastated properties into real gems. Now with better visuals, voice acting, and fresh content – it’s flipping, just way better.

REVAMPED STORYLINE

Meet new faces, enjoy full voice acting, and follow a reimagined narrative that adds charm and character to every mission. Renovating has never felt so personal.

MEANING OF LOVE!

Get to know new stories, crafted specially for the new, fresh House Flipper. In this cozy chaos, be a witness to different types of love. Help newlyweds renovate their own place, or help someone express their love for coffee truly! Expect charming characters, emotional twists, and homes that come with a story… And maybe a spark or two.

ALL DLCs IN ONE PACKAGE

New to flipping or returning for more? You’re in for a treat. House Flipper Remaster bundles all previous expansions in one ultimate edition, making it the most complete version of the game to date. Everything’s here – now it’s your turn to make it beautiful.

Descrierea conținutului pentru adulți indisponibilă.

System Requirements

Windows

MacOS
item.content:encoded:
Title: House Flipper Remastered Collection
Genre: Casual , Indie , Simulation
Developer: Frozen Way
Publisher: Frozen Way , Frozen District
Franchise: Frozen Way , Frozen District , House Flipper
Release Date: Jun 4, 2026




About This Game

RENOVATION NEVER LOOKED SO GOOD

House Flipper Remastered Collection is your upgraded ticket to the satisfying world of renovation chaos. Step into the boots of a one-person crew and transform those filthy, devastated properties into real gems. Now with better visuals, voice acting, and fresh content – it’s flipping, just way better.

REVAMPED STORYLINE

Meet new faces, enjoy full voice acting, and follow a reimagined narrative that adds charm and character to every mission. Renovating has never felt so personal.

MEANING OF LOVE!

Get to know new stories, crafted specially for the new, fresh House Flipper. In this cozy chaos, be a witness to different types of love. Help newlyweds renovate their own place, or help someone express their love for coffee truly! Expect charming characters, emotional twists, and homes that come with a story… And maybe a spark or two.

ALL DLCs IN ONE PACKAGE

New to flipping or returning for more? You’re in for a treat. House Flipper Remaster bundles all previous expansions in one ultimate edition, making it the most complete version of the game to date. Everything’s here – now it’s your turn to make it beautiful.

Descrierea conținutului pentru adulți indisponibilă.

System Requirements

Windows

MacOS

item.title: Pronoun Palace
item.description:
Title: Pronoun Palace
Genre: Casual , Indie
Developer: Cadence Petersen , Hazel Fackler
Publisher: Cadence Petersen , Hazel Fackler
Release Date: Jun 4, 2026




About This Game

Pronoun Palace is a word-spelling roguelike set in a dystopian future where the government has taken your pronouns. Use spells to manipulate letter tiles, catch fish, and abuse amphetamines to defeat the Party and get your pronouns back!

Gameplay

  • Strategize your spelling; use wooden tiles to attack and plastic tiles to defend. Activate spells to manipulate tiles to your favor—shift letters across the alphabet, turn tiles into candy, and watch words spell themselves with wildcards.

  • Retransition as different characters in the face of an oppressive bureaucratic collectivist state. Take advantage of their unique abilities to hole punch tiles and submit multiple words at once, weave through fish to catch specific letters, or juggle ticking bombs against a racing clock!

  • Battle a wide variety of enemies that each change the game. Manage tiles afflicted with effects such as poison, trigrams, and capital letters. Solve mystery letters through deduction, keep yaoi and yuri tiles from touching, or spell words long enough to make an enemy heel!

Features

  • 5 playable characters

  • 50+ unique enemy encounters

  • 75+ different spells

  • 70+ unlockable achievements

  • 10+ difficulty levels

  • Daily runs, complete with leaderboards

  • Over an hour of incredible music by RENREN

Mature Content Description

The developers describe the content like this:

This game contains cartoon blood, violence, gore, nudity, drug use, and explicit writing.



System Requirements

Windows

MacOS

Linux
item.content:encoded:
Title: Pronoun Palace
Genre: Casual , Indie
Developer: Cadence Petersen , Hazel Fackler
Publisher: Cadence Petersen , Hazel Fackler
Release Date: Jun 4, 2026




About This Game

Pronoun Palace is a word-spelling roguelike set in a dystopian future where the government has taken your pronouns. Use spells to manipulate letter tiles, catch fish, and abuse amphetamines to defeat the Party and get your pronouns back!

Gameplay

  • Strategize your spelling; use wooden tiles to attack and plastic tiles to defend. Activate spells to manipulate tiles to your favor—shift letters across the alphabet, turn tiles into candy, and watch words spell themselves with wildcards.

  • Retransition as different characters in the face of an oppressive bureaucratic collectivist state. Take advantage of their unique abilities to hole punch tiles and submit multiple words at once, weave through fish to catch specific letters, or juggle ticking bombs against a racing clock!

  • Battle a wide variety of enemies that each change the game. Manage tiles afflicted with effects such as poison, trigrams, and capital letters. Solve mystery letters through deduction, keep yaoi and yuri tiles from touching, or spell words long enough to make an enemy heel!

Features

  • 5 playable characters

  • 50+ unique enemy encounters

  • 75+ different spells

  • 70+ unlockable achievements

  • 10+ difficulty levels

  • Daily runs, complete with leaderboards

  • Over an hour of incredible music by RENREN

Mature Content Description

The developers describe the content like this:

This game contains cartoon blood, violence, gore, nudity, drug use, and explicit writing.



System Requirements

Windows

MacOS

Linux

item.title: The 7th Guest Remake
item.description:
Title: The 7th Guest Remake
Genre: Adventure
Developer: Vertigo Games , Exkee
Publisher: Vertigo Games
Franchise: The 7th Guest
Release Date: Jun 3, 2026




About This Game

The iconic game The 7th Guest has been brought back to life with modern technology, delivering an atmospheric story like no other.

Six guests have been welcomed to a foreboding mansion, but something sinister is at play. The wealthy recluse and toymaker Henry Stauf lurks in the shadows, and a dark power hangs over the house, shrouded in mystery. Who is the seventh guest? What does Henry want with them? And who will live to tell the tale?

As you explore the eerie mansion, the puzzles grow increasingly challenging, with dangers lurking around every corner. Every shadow, distant creak, and flicker of light builds tension as the house slowly reveals its secrets.

The 7th Guest is the ultimate mystery adventure for players who love mind-bending puzzles, haunting exploration, and a chilling story.

  • Cinematic Storytelling Through Volumetric Video: Step inside the story. Using cutting-edge, newly recorded volumetric video, live-action performances are captured in full 3D, placing you directly inside Henry Stauf’s mansion at the heart of the mystery. Real actors appear within the world itself, making every encounter feel immediate and unsettling.

  • Unique Mind-Bending Puzzle Gameplay: The equally beloved and feared haunted mansion comes alive around you with high-end visuals and carefully redesigned, all-new handcrafted puzzles. Every puzzle is woven into the story and rooted in the mansion’s lore, with recognizable elements that pay homage to the original.

  • Dynamic Environments: The haunted mansion shifts and transforms around you through high-end visuals and clever optical illusions. Investigate every creepy nook and cranny. Unlock new rooms, uncover hidden secrets, and keep your wits about you as the horrors within begin to close in.

Mature Content Description

The developers describe the content like this:

Murder mystery



System Requirements

Windows

    Minimum:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows 10 - 64 bit
    • Processor: Intel i3-8600K
    • Memory: 8 GB RAM
    • Graphics: RTX 2060
    • DirectX: Version 12
    • Storage: 26 GB available space
    Recommended:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows 10 - 64 bit
    • Processor: i7-9700K / Ryzen 7 3700
    • Memory: 16 GB RAM
    • Graphics: RTX 2070 / RX 5700 XT
    • DirectX: Version 12
    • Storage: 26 GB available space
item.content:encoded:
Title: The 7th Guest Remake
Genre: Adventure
Developer: Vertigo Games , Exkee
Publisher: Vertigo Games
Franchise: The 7th Guest
Release Date: Jun 3, 2026




About This Game

The iconic game The 7th Guest has been brought back to life with modern technology, delivering an atmospheric story like no other.

Six guests have been welcomed to a foreboding mansion, but something sinister is at play. The wealthy recluse and toymaker Henry Stauf lurks in the shadows, and a dark power hangs over the house, shrouded in mystery. Who is the seventh guest? What does Henry want with them? And who will live to tell the tale?

As you explore the eerie mansion, the puzzles grow increasingly challenging, with dangers lurking around every corner. Every shadow, distant creak, and flicker of light builds tension as the house slowly reveals its secrets.

The 7th Guest is the ultimate mystery adventure for players who love mind-bending puzzles, haunting exploration, and a chilling story.

  • Cinematic Storytelling Through Volumetric Video: Step inside the story. Using cutting-edge, newly recorded volumetric video, live-action performances are captured in full 3D, placing you directly inside Henry Stauf’s mansion at the heart of the mystery. Real actors appear within the world itself, making every encounter feel immediate and unsettling.

  • Unique Mind-Bending Puzzle Gameplay: The equally beloved and feared haunted mansion comes alive around you with high-end visuals and carefully redesigned, all-new handcrafted puzzles. Every puzzle is woven into the story and rooted in the mansion’s lore, with recognizable elements that pay homage to the original.

  • Dynamic Environments: The haunted mansion shifts and transforms around you through high-end visuals and clever optical illusions. Investigate every creepy nook and cranny. Unlock new rooms, uncover hidden secrets, and keep your wits about you as the horrors within begin to close in.

Mature Content Description

The developers describe the content like this:

Murder mystery



System Requirements

Windows

    Minimum:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows 10 - 64 bit
    • Processor: Intel i3-8600K
    • Memory: 8 GB RAM
    • Graphics: RTX 2060
    • DirectX: Version 12
    • Storage: 26 GB available space
    Recommended:
    • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
    • OS: Windows 10 - 64 bit
    • Processor: i7-9700K / Ryzen 7 3700
    • Memory: 16 GB RAM
    • Graphics: RTX 2070 / RX 5700 XT
    • DirectX: Version 12
    • Storage: 26 GB available space

item.title: IncreKnight
item.description:
Title: IncreKnight
Genre: Action , Adventure , Casual , Strategy
Developer: SUPERita
Publisher: SUPERita
Release Date: Jun 3, 2026




About This Game

A short incremental game about a Knight slaying a Dragon

The evil dragon had destroyed the town!

The king sent its strongest knight to slay him.

Fight Monsters

The dragon's layer is filled with monsters defending it. you must fight them in order to get to him!

Buy Upgrades

Sell the loot from slaying monsters to buy new skills, powers. and weapons!

Cast Spells

Learn powerful spells from the wizard and unleash them on the monsters in the dungeon!

Descrierea conținutului pentru adulți indisponibilă.

System Requirements

Windows

    Minimum:
    • OS *: Windows 7, 8, 10, 11 x64
    • Processor: 500 MB RAM
    • Memory: 2 GB RAM
    • Graphics: anything 100$+
    • Storage: 300 MB available space
* Starting January 1st, 2024, the Steam Client will only support Windows 10 and later versions.
item.content:encoded:
Title: IncreKnight
Genre: Action , Adventure , Casual , Strategy
Developer: SUPERita
Publisher: SUPERita
Release Date: Jun 3, 2026




About This Game

A short incremental game about a Knight slaying a Dragon

The evil dragon had destroyed the town!

The king sent its strongest knight to slay him.

Fight Monsters

The dragon's layer is filled with monsters defending it. you must fight them in order to get to him!

Buy Upgrades

Sell the loot from slaying monsters to buy new skills, powers. and weapons!

Cast Spells

Learn powerful spells from the wizard and unleash them on the monsters in the dungeon!

Descrierea conținutului pentru adulți indisponibilă.

System Requirements

Windows

    Minimum:
    • OS *: Windows 7, 8, 10, 11 x64
    • Processor: 500 MB RAM
    • Memory: 2 GB RAM
    • Graphics: anything 100$+
    • Storage: 300 MB available space
* Starting January 1st, 2024, the Steam Client will only support Windows 10 and later versions.
